sections.content: Flat, scenic ~2.5-mi loop around the bay. Great easy day.
Parking fills by 9am — use the far lot by the fort.
Water fountain + restrooms by the fort; Sullivan's sells water & Gatorade.
Trusted-local tip: the back stretch ices over first in winter.
Reminder: right knee twinges on the back stretch — ease off.
Swan boats + the willows. Calm loop, good for an easy shakeout.
Meet by the Make Way for Ducklings statues — easy landmark.
Club shakeout: two laps of the lagoon path, then out onto the Common.
Local tip: the Arlington St gate opens earliest — quietest before 8am.
Note to self: confirm the swan boats are running before recommending.

properties.title: Charles River loop
properties.author: runner
properties.docs: TOUR SHOWCASE — the demo tour opens this note by title. Keep the title and the full rule spread. See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-04-demo-tour-design.md before editing.

sections.content: Flat ~4.5 km loop: east along Memorial Drive, over the Longfellow Bridge, back along the Esplanade, closing across the Mass Ave bridge. Water fountains near both bridges.
Start from the Mass Ave bridge so you finish with the Esplanade views.
Club tempo: pick it up between the bridges, float the bridge climbs.
Trusted tip: the Esplanade puddles near the lagoon after heavy rain.
Reminder: refill at the Longfellow fountain — the Mass Ave one is often off.
